hero.title: Frictionless access to digital services.
hero.subtitle: Your credentials. One click. Any service. Simple, fast, and secure.
hero.description: PDW is your next-generation tool for using digital credentials (such as diplomas or identification) in real-world services, eliminating forms and repetitive processes.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.text: Your data is processed locally on your device. You decide what you share and with whom.

compliance.title: European Compliance
compliance.text: Fully aligned with the EBSI infrastructure and the European digital identity framework, ensuring legal validity across the European Union.

education.title: Education (Real Case)
education.text: We start where the future is formed. PDW already enables academic diploma management with instant verification.

diplomaCase.title: Case: Digital Diplomas
diplomaCase.text: We transformed academic validation: the university issues your diploma as a digital credential stored in your PDW. When applying for a job, the recruiter verifies authenticity instantly via QR Code, reducing waiting time by 90% and eliminating fraud.

videoShowcase.title: See PDW in action
videoShowcase.subtitle: Discover how Portugal's digital wallet works in under 2 minutes.

heading.title: Priority Use Cases
heading.subtitle: Gradual implementation focused on institutional value and digital sovereignty.

diplomas.title: University Diplomas
diplomas.text: Issuance and verification of diplomas with selective and instant sharing.

studentId.title: Student Identity
studentId.text: Multi-service student credential for academic ecosystems.

microCredentials.title: Professional Micro-credentials
microCredentials.text: Validation of skills and continuous learning pathways.

health.title: Decentralized Health
health.text: Take control of your medical history. Share your health data securely and privately with doctors and institutions across Europe.

foodChain.title: Food Traceability
foodChain.text: Verify the origin and quality of what you consume. Track the entire agricultural value chain from production to retail through immutable digital proofs.

realEstate.title: Digital Assets & Real Estate
realEstate.text: Frictionless real estate transactions and asset management. Use your PDW to sign contracts in a legally binding and 100% digital way.

heading.title: About the Project
heading.subtitle: The Portuguese Digital Wallet (PDW) is the critical national infrastructure for the decentralized economy.

whatIsPdw.title: What is the Portuguese Digital Wallet?
whatIsPdw.text: PDW is Portugal's "Credential Execution Layer", constituting critical national infrastructure for the decentralized economy. The project integrates the Mobilizing Agenda "Blockchain.PT" (formally "Decentralize Portugal with Blockchain"), a strategic effort funded by the Recovery and Resilience Plan (PRR) and the NextGenerationEU program. Under the global consortium leadership of VOID Software, TecMinho assumes institutional and technical coordination in developing this cutting-edge solution.

strategicContext.title: Strategic Context
strategicContext.text: PDW constitutes the critical trust infrastructure of the 'Decentralize Portugal with Blockchain' Mobilizing Agenda. It integrates an ecosystem aiming to launch 26 innovative products worldwide, positioning Portugal as a high-tech exporter.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To ensure citizens' digital sovereignty and eliminate friction in identification processes, consolidating a resilient and decentralized national infrastructure for digital services.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To establish PDW as the absolute national reference in secure digital identity, leading the transition to an interoperable and user-focused credential ecosystem.

standards.title: Foundations and Technical Standards
standards.eidas: eIDAS 2.0: European regulation defining the legal framework for secure cross-border electronic identification, enabling trustworthy digital interactions between Member States.
standards.ebsi: EBSI Approved: Compliance with the European Blockchain Services Infrastructure, serving as the backbone for cross-border document and identity verification with full integrity.
standards.eudi: EUDI ARF Conformant: Alignment with the Architecture and Reference Framework, ensuring the Portuguese wallet is technically interoperable with national digital wallets across the European Union.

list.name: TecMinho
list.description: University of Minho's interface dedicated to knowledge transfer to the market, promoting innovation and entrepreneurship. Founded in 1990.

list.name: University of Minho
list.description: Public higher education institution focused on excellence in education, research and active cooperation with society.

governance.title: Governance Model
governance.text: PDW benefits from the governance of the Blockchain.PT Agenda, structured into a deliberative Steering Committee and an operational Executive Committee. This organization ensures continuous risk mitigation, scientific compliance and the delivery of high-quality infrastructure.

heading.title: The PDW Solution
heading.subtitle: Based on the Self-Sovereign Identity (SSI) paradigm and verifiable credentials.

whatIsWallet.title: What is a digital wallet?
whatIsWallet.text: Your next-generation tool for using digital credentials in real-world services. It works as an "execution layer", allowing you to receive, store and present documents instantly.

whatAreVCs.title: What are Verifiable Credentials?
whatAreVCs.text: Secure digital versions of documents (like diplomas or IDs). They are cryptographically secure, machine-verifiable and guarantee your privacy through methods like selective disclosure — sharing only what is necessary.

step1.label: Issuance
step1.text: The authorized entity (e.g., University) issues the credential to your PDW.

step2.label: Storage
step2.text: The credential is saved securely and encrypted on your local device.

step3.label: Sharing
step3.text: You decide what data to share via a QR Code or secure link.

step4.label: Verification
step4.text: The verifier validates the authenticity of the credential in seconds via EBSI blockchain.

interoperability.label: Native Interoperability
interoperability.text: Fully aligned with the European reference framework (EUID Wallet), enabling use across the entire European Union.

security.label: Maximum Security
security.text: Based on blockchain trust models and private keys stored on your device.

privacy.label: Privacy by Design
privacy.text: Data is processed locally. The user is the only one who decides who can access their information.

technicalStandards.title: Technical Standards
technicalStandards.w3c: Compliance with W3C standards for Verifiable Credentials.
technicalStandards.ebsi: Use of EBSI (European Blockchain Services Infrastructure), the first EU-scale blockchain infrastructure driven by the public sector.
technicalStandards.dids: Automatic generation of Decentralized Identifiers (DIDs) at the time of wallet creation.

trustTriangle.title: Trust Ecosystem
trustTriangle.description: The Triangle of Trust connects the Issuer, the Holder and the Verifier, all linked by the EBSI trust layer.

flowDiagram.alt: Credential flow diagram: Issuance, Storage, Sharing and Verification

appMockup.alt: PDW application interface — credential details screen

heading.title: Digital Diplomas
heading.subtitle: Transforming academic validation in Portugal and Europe.

problem.title: The Current Problem
problem.text: Currently, diploma verification is a slow, manual, and fraud-prone process, taking days or weeks to be completed by recruiters or institutions.

solution.title: The PDW Solution
solution.text: The university issues the diploma as a digital credential. When applying for a job, the recruiter verifies authenticity instantly via a QR Code.

benefits.title: Benefits
benefits.fraud: Total elimination of academic document fraud.
benefits.cost: Drastic reduction in administrative costs and paper issuance.

flowImage.alt: Digital diploma verification flow: University issues, Student stores, Recruiter verifies

contactCTA.title: Ready to integrate PDW?
contactCTA.subtitle: Leave your institutional email and our team will get in touch within 48 hours.

heading.title: Contacts and Partnerships
heading.subtitle: Want to implement PDW in your institution or participate in the ecosystem?

contacts.invite: Our team of experts is available to discuss pilot programs and institutional integrations.
contacts.afterContact: After submitting the form, our team will get in touch within 48 hours to schedule a personalized demonstration session.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.text: PDW respects your digital sovereignty. This site only collects data voluntarily submitted for institutional contact purposes. In compliance with GDPR, we guarantee the right of access, rectification, and deletion of your data.
privacy.dataCollected: Collected data: Name, Institution, Email, and Message (form only).
privacy.purpose: Purpose: Responding to information requests and partnerships.

doc.title: Privacy Policy
doc.preamble: PDW respects your digital sovereignty. This site only collects data voluntarily submitted for institutional contact purposes. In compliance with GDPR, we guarantee the right of access, rectification, and deletion of your personal data.

sections.title: Data Collected
body: We only collect data you voluntarily submit through the contact form: Name, Institution, Email Address, and Message.
We do not collect browsing data, do not use tracking cookies, and do not share any data with third parties for commercial purposes.

sections.title: Purpose of Processing
body: Data is used exclusively to respond to institutional information requests and establish partnerships within the scope of the Portuguese Digital Wallet.
Your data is not used for any marketing, profiling, or commercial analysis purposes.

sections.title: Legal Basis
body: The processing of your data is based on your explicit consent, pursuant to Article 6(1)(a) of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
You may withdraw your consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing carried out based on consent before its withdrawal.

sections.title: Your Rights
body: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectification, erasure, portability, restriction, and objection to the processing of your personal data.
To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at the address below. We will respond within a maximum of 30 days.

sections.title: Data Security
body: We adopt appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure, or accidental or unlawful destruction.

doc.contact: For privacy inquiries or exercise of rights: rmagalhaes@tecminho.uminho.pt

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.text: The content of this site is for information purposes. Use of the PDW brand and associated content is subject to prior authorization from TecMinho and Blockchain.PT Agenda partners.
terms.liability: Limitation of Liability: Information is provided 'as is', without guarantees of immediate updates regarding technical development.
terms.copyright: Copyright: All rights reserved to TecMinho and partners.

doc.title: Terms of Use
doc.preamble: By accessing and using the Portuguese Digital Wallet (PDW) website, you agree to these Terms of Use. Please read them carefully before proceeding.

sections.title: Scope and Use
body: This website is intended exclusively for the dissemination of institutional information about the Portuguese Digital Wallet, its services, partners, and mission.
Any use that violates applicable law, third-party rights, or that damages the reputation of PDW, TecMinho, or its partners is prohibited.

sections.title: Intellectual Property and Copyright
body: All content on this site — including texts, images, logos, graphics and software — is the property of TecMinho and the Blockchain.PT Agenda consortium partners, protected by copyright and intellectual property law.
Total or partial reproduction of any content without prior written authorisation is expressly prohibited.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
body: Information provided is offered 'as is', without any guarantees of completeness, accuracy, or immediate updates regarding the technical development of the project.
TecMinho is not responsible for any direct or indirect damages resulting from the use or inability to use this website.

sections.title: External Links
body: This site may contain links to third-party websites. These links are provided for convenience only and do not imply any endorsement or responsibility for their content.

sections.title: Changes to Terms
body: We reserve the right to update these Terms of Use at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on this site.

doc.contact: For questions related to the Terms of Use: rmagalhaes@tecminho.uminho.pt
